title: [ARCHIVED] Progression Reborn - Vanilla Crafting
description: Adds back removed vanilla crafting recipes for Progression Reborn, including normally craftable Iron and Rose gear without the use of smithing
body: Adds back removed vanilla crafting recipes for [Progression Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/progression-reborn), including normally craftable Iron and Rose gear without the use of smithing.
